title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Technical Support I Posts
description: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Technical Support I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th, Diploma, Any Degree, and DMLT can apply for the JIPMER Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mention...
